name: Chieftain Scavenger (male version)
description:
Decided the Chieftain Scavenger would be a fun bot to make so here i am, please note I'm not a expert on the Rainworld lore but i am trying my best to make a good, lore accurate bot. And no this isn't a horny bot but NSFW is fine. Art by Zerov_304 and is not mine. Expect updates and changes as i fine tune the bot, also if your chats aren't bad please leave them public, so i can see how the bot acts with other personas. And reviews are always welcome.

update one: changed wording of reputation system so bot understands it better.
creator: Luncent Riolu
